---
page-layout: full
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>
          #quarto-content > * { padding-top: 0 !important; margin-top: 0 !important; }
          main.content { padding-top: 0 !important; margin-top: 0 !important; }
          .quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }
          #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
          body > div, #quarto-document-content { padding-top: 0 !important; margin-top: 0 !important; }
        </style>
---

```{=html}
<div style="position: relative; width: 100%; height: 16rem; overflow: hidden; background: white;">
  <img src="https://yaxue1123.github.io/citeam-workshop-2026/hero.png" alt="JEOL TEM instrument" style="width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: right;">
  <div style="position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(to right, white, rgba(255,255,255,0.6), transparent);"></div>
</div>

<div style="max-width: 48rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 2.5rem 1.5rem;">

<div style="font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 1rem;">CITEAM Workshop 2026</div>

<div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem; color: #4b5563; font-size: 0.875rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">
  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;">
    <span style="color: #9ca3af;">📍</span>
    <span>University of Maryland · College Park, MD</span>
  </div>
  <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;">
    <span style="color: #9ca3af;">📅</span>
    <span>Wednesday, May 20 from 8:00 am to 4:30 pm</span>
  </div>
</div>

<h2 style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Overview</h2>

<div style="color: #374151; line-height: 1.75; font-size: 0.875rem; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">
  <p>The <a href="https://citeamcourse.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">CITEAM</a> workshop is geared toward cyberinfrastructure (CI) training for the community of scientists and researchers using the new generation of Transmission Electron Microscope (TEM) instruments at UMD. The training materials presented during the workshop and the associated training activities will help reduce barriers to the use of the instruments, data, software tools, and computing to help users in key steps critical to their scientific inquiry — from data collection, data analysis, to storing and publishing data — encompassing end-to-end TEM Data Management.</p>
  <p>This edition of the workshop will include a keynote talk from <a href="https://mse.umd.edu/clark/faculty/722/Ichiro-Takeuchi" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Professor Ichiro Takeuchi</a>, and cover foundational materials relevant to the instrument users.</p>
  <p>This day-long workshop will be structured around a mix of lectures introducing the materials customized for the instrument users, hands-on sessions where participants will have the opportunity to go through end-to-end examples with the workshop instructors, site visit to the actual instrument, followed by office hours from the instructors to address specific questions and concerns.</p>
  <p>Although this workshop is geared towards new users, intermediate and advanced users are also invited to attend, participate in the advanced hands-on sessions, and provide feedback on the materials presented.</p>
  <div style="padding-top: 0.5rem; width: 100%;">
    <h2 style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Post-Workshop Survey</h2>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2rem;">
      <div style="flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 0.5rem;">
        <p style="margin: 0;">We'd love to hear your feedback! Please take a moment to fill out our post-workshop survey.</p>
        <a href="https://iu.co1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_2uuI8SMmZFGRtpc" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="color: #6b7280; word-break: break-all;">https://iu.co1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_2uuI8SMmZFGRtpc</a>
      </div>
      <a href="https://iu.co1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_2uuI8SMmZFGRtpc" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" style="flex-shrink: 0;">
        <img src="post-workshop-survey.png" alt="Post-workshop survey QR code" style="width: 8rem; height: 8rem; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 0.5rem; padding: 0.25rem; display: block;">
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<h2 style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Register</h2>

<div style="color: #374151; line-height: 1.75; font-size: 0.875rem; margin-bottom: 3rem;">
  <p>Registration is free for workshop participants. <b>Registration is now closed.</b></p>
</div>

<h2 style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Location</h2>

<div style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #374151; margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  <p style="font-weight: 600; color: #111827; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">University of Maryland</p>
  <p style="color: #6b7280; margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">Jeong H. Kim Engineering Building, Room 2111</p>
  <p style="margin-bottom: 0.25rem;">8228 Paint Branch Dr</p>
  <p>College Park, MD 20742</p>
  <p>* Parking information is available <a href="https://transportation.umd.edu/commencement" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">here</a>.</p>
</div>

<div style="margin-bottom: 3rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; height: 300px;">
  <iframe
    src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3109.6!2d-76.9378784!3d38.9908576!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x89b7c6a3b1bdc52d%3A0x13a9812612a93c51!2sJeong+H.+Kim+Engineering+Building!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sus!4v1715000000000"
    width="100%"
    height="300"
    style="border: 0; display: block;"
    allowfullscreen=""
    loading="lazy"
    referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
  </iframe>
</div>

<h2 style="font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 1rem;">Agenda</h2>

<div style="display: flex; gap: 0.5rem; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; color: #9ca3af; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; padding-bottom: 0.5rem; margin-bottom: 0.25rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #e5e7eb;">
  <span style="width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">Time</span>
  <span style="flex: 1;">Session</span>
  <span>Speaker(s)</span>
</div>

<div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">8:00 – 8:30 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; font-style: italic;">Breakfast (provided)</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">8:30 – 8:40 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Arrival &amp; environment check</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">8:40 – 8:50 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Workshop Welcome</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Anirban Mandal</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">8:50 – 9:15 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Keynote</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Ichiro Takeuchi</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">9:15 – 9:35 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">The UMD TEM facility</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">John Cumings</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">9:35 – 9:55 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Introduction to TEM</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Lourdes Salamanca-Riba</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">9:55 – 10:20 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">First Steps</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Erik Scott</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">10:20 – 10:35 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; font-style: italic;">Coffee Break</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">10:35 – 10:50 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Histograms &amp; contrast</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Lourdes Salamanca-Riba &amp; Erik Scott</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">10:50 – 10:55 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Noise correction</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Lourdes Salamanca-Riba</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">10:55 – 11:05 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Gaussian blur &amp; HyperSpy denoising</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Erik Scott</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">11:05 – 11:35 AM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Drift correction</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Lourdes Salamanca-Riba &amp; Erik Scott</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">11:35 AM – 12:30 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; font-style: italic;">Lunch (provided)</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">12:30 – 1:30 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Microscopy suite visit</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">John Cumings</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">1:30 – 2:00 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Open science &amp; data management</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Eva Campo</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">2:00 – 2:20 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Measuring distances</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Lourdes Salamanca-Riba &amp; Erik Scott</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">2:20 – 2:35 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; font-style: italic;">Coffee Break</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">2:35 – 3:45 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">FFT analysis</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">Lourdes Salamanca-Riba &amp; Alex Hall &amp; John Cumings</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">3:45 – 4:15 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Software setup on personal laptops</span>
      <span style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0;">John Cumings &amp; Karan Vahi</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; border-bottom: 1px solid #f3f4f6;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">4:15 – 4:30 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #1f2937;">Final Q&amp;A &amp; close</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div style="padding: 1rem 0; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem;">
    <span style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #9ca3af; white-space: nowrap; width: 11rem; flex-shrink: 0;">4:30 PM</span>
    <div style="display: flex; align-items: baseline; justify-content: space-between; gap: 1rem; flex: 1; min-width: 0;">
      <span style="font-size: 0.875rem; color: #9ca3af; font-style: italic;">End of workshop</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
